Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class PositionInfo

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.PositionInfo
public class PositionInfo extends Object
represents a group of three Positions: relativePosition, startPosition, endPosition 2019-09-10 Wolfram Pfeifer: work with URIs instead of Strings -> more robust, more general

    Description

    Creates a new PositionInfo without resource information but only with positions.

    Creates a new PositionInfo without the given resource information.

  • Field Details

    • UNDEFINED

      public static final PositionInfo UNDEFINED
      PositionInfo with undefined positions.

  • Constructor Details

    • PositionInfo

      public PositionInfo(SourceElement.Position relPos, Position startPos, Position endPos)
      Creates a new PositionInfo without resource information but only with positions.
      Parameters:
      relPos - the relative position
      startPos - the start position
      endPos - the end position

    • PositionInfo

      public PositionInfo(SourceElement.Position relPos, Position startPos, Position endPos, URI fileURI)
      Creates a new PositionInfo without the given resource information.
      Parameters:
      relPos - the relative position
      startPos - the start position
      endPos - the end position
      fileURI - the resource the PositionInfo refers to

  • Method Details

    • getFileName

      @Deprecated public String getFileName()
      Deprecated.
      This method should no longer be used, as PositionInfo can now be used with resources other than files. Use getURI() instead.
      Returns the path of the file the PositionInfo refers to.
      Returns:
      the filename as a string if fileURI uses the "file" protocol or null otherwise

    • getParentClassURI

      @Nullable public URI getParentClassURI()

    • getURI

      public Optional<URI> getURI()

    • getURL

      public Optional<URL> getURL() throws MalformedURLException
      Throws:
      MalformedURLException

    • getRelativePosition

      public SourceElement.Position getRelativePosition()

    • getStartPosition

      public Position getStartPosition()

    • getEndPosition

      public Position getEndPosition()

    • join

      public static PositionInfo join(PositionInfo p1, PositionInfo p2)
      Creates a new PositionInfo from joining the intervals of the given PositionInfos. The file information have to match, otherwise null is returned.
      Parameters:
      p1 - the first PositionInfo
      p2 - the second PositionInfo
      Returns:
      a new PositionInfo starting at the minimum of the two start positions and ending at the maximum of the two end positions.

    • startEndValid

      public boolean startEndValid()
      Checks if start and end position are both defined and in valid range.
      Returns:
      true iff start and end are valid

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
